## Meeting Purpose

[Review and refine content for an eBook and blog article about data platform modernization.](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content needs alignment with Soham's (guest speaker) webinar presentation, focusing on data platform evolution](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [eBook version is closer to the desired narrative; blog post requires significant revision](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=190.0)
  - [Team aims to publish 2 content pieces weekly, prioritizing regular output over perfection](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=1514.0)

## Topics

### Content Alignment with Webinar

  - [Original article diverged from Soham's webinar focus on data platform evolution](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=65.0)
  - [eBook version more accurately reflects the webinar content](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [Blog post needs revision to match Soham's narrative: ETL → Hadoop → cloud warehouse → lakehouse approach](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)

### Content Refinement Strategy

  - [Matt to create a third version, merging eBook and blog content](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
  - [Focus on reporting historical facts rather than taking stances on contentious issues](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=543.0)
  - [Remove extraneous details not mentioned in the webinar (e.g., processing cycles, lag)](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=100.0)
  - [Aim for a concise (\~700-800 word) guest-authored blog post](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

### eBook Development

  - [Team expected Matt to enrich eBook content beyond webinar transcript](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=206.0)
  - [Matt to add comments in eBook for potential expansions](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=854.0)
  - [Full eBook review on hold due to bandwidth constraints](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=921.0)

### Publishing Goals and Challenges

  - [Team aiming to publish two content pieces weekly](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)
  - [Matt pushing to maintain regular publishing schedule, viewing inconsistent output as a failure](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=1593.0)
  - [Emphasis on overcoming obstacles to meet publishing goals](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=1562.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matt to create a revised version of the blog post, merging eBook and original blog content](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Remove code examples from the article, converting to a simple list format](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=1459.0)
  - [Publish the revised article under Matt's name (non-indexed)](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
  - [Continue focus on regular content publishing, balancing quality with consistent output](https://fathom.video/share/F5TiH9pkkGz5GJy5McSS-tckxD5pQvpc?tab=summary&timestamp=1584.0)
